# List of namelist input parameters

\<color #ed1c24\>**The following table is generated automatically from
the code by a script. Consequently, it makes no sense to modify this
page!**\</color\> If you want to improve the description of an input
parameter, this needs to be done in `models/phys_module.f90` directly in
the code. Re-generating this table can be done by
`./util/parameter-overview.sh` which writes out a file
`parameter-overview.txt`, that can be pasted into the wiki. This page
should always reflect the parameters present in the `develop` branch,
not the parameters of a branch not yet merged.

   **wall_resistivity_fact**     1\.                           Scaling factor for the wall and coil resistivities specified in STARWALL                          x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x                     
     **wall_resistivity**        0\.                                               Resistivity of the external wall                                              x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x

        **Z_axis_ref**          1.d22                      Target magnetic axis vertical position (see [fbnd_eq_FAQs](jorek-starwall-faqs))                      x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x
        **R_axis_ref**          -99.                   Optional target magnetic axis radial position (see [fbnd_eq_FAQs](jorek-starwall-faqs))                               x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x

    **FB_Zaxis_derivative**      0\.                      Amplification factor for Zaxis feedback (see [fbnd_eq_FAQs](jorek-starwall-faqs))                      x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x

    **cte_current_FB_fact**     -1d99             Constant factor that scales FF'& T profiles before freebnd GS iterations (switches off current FB)                         x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x     x
